executives.name: Francois Motte
executives.background: Mr. Motte has over 15 years of experience in financial management and corporate finance, previously serving in senior roles at Hochschild Mining.

executives.name: Ramon Barua
executives.background: Mr. Barua has been the CEO of Aclara since its inception. He was previously the CFO of Hochschild Mining PLC and has over 20 years of experience in the mining and finance industries.

board_of_directors.background: Chairman of Hochschild Mining PLC and a prominent figure in the Latin American mining sector.
